sentences.target: On traverse la vallée en fin d'après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁavɛʁs la vale ɑ̃ fɛ̃ dapʁɛmidi/

translations.fr: On traverse la vallée en fin d'après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁavɛʁs la vale ɑ̃ fɛ̃ dapʁɛmidi/
translations.en: We’re crossing the valley in the late afternoon.
translations.es: Estamos cruzando el valle al final de la tarde.
translations.de: Wir überqueren das Tal am späten Nachmittag.
translations.it: Stiamo attraversando la valle nel tardo pomeriggio.
translations.ko: 우리는 늦은 오후에 계곡을 건너고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在傍晚时分穿过山谷。
translations.yue: 我哋喺傍晚時分穿過山谷。
translations.pt: Estamos atravessando o vale no final da tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו חוצים את העמק בשעות אחר הצהריים המאוחרות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang băng qua thung lũng vào cuối buổi chiều.
translations.ar: نعبر الوادي في وقت متأخر من بعد الظهر.
translations.nl: We steken de vallei over aan het eind van de middag.
translations.hi: हम देर दोपहर में घाटी पार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διασχίζουμε την κοιλάδα αργά το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Vi krysser dalen sent på ettermiddagen.
translations.id: Kami menyeberangi lembah pada sore hari menjelang malam.
translations.sv: Vi korsar dalen sent på eftermiddagen.
translations.da: Vi krydser dalen sent på eftermiddagen.
translations.ja: 午後の遅い時間に谷を横切っています.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/generic), 3rd person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'la vallée' as its direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'vallée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'traverse'.
Preposition introducing a temporal circumstantial complement ('en fin d'après-midi').
Noun head of the prepositional phrase; linked to 'après-midi' by 'd''.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel; links 'fin' to 'après-midi'.
Compound noun; complement of 'de' within the temporal PP.

sentences.target: Tu vois la vallée derrière le village.
sentences.reading: /ty vwa la vale dɛʁjɛʁ lə vilaʒ/

translations.fr: Tu vois la vallée derrière le village.
translations.ipa: /ty vwa la vale dɛʁjɛʁ lə vilaʒ/
translations.en: Do you see the valley behind the village?
translations.de: Siehst du das Tal hinter dem Dorf?
translations.it: Vedi la valle dietro il paese?
translations.zh-Hans: 你看到村庄后面的山谷吗？
translations.yue: 你見到村後面嘅山谷嗎？
translations.pt: Você vê o vale atrás da aldeia?
translations.he: אתה רואה את העמק מאחורי הכפר?
translations.vi: Bạn có thấy thung lũng phía sau ngôi làng không?
translations.nl: Zie je de vallei achter het dorp?
translations.hu: Látod a völgyet a falu mögött?
translations.hi: क्या तुम गाँव के पीछे वाली घाटी देख रहे हो?
translations.el: Βλέπεις την κοιλάδα πίσω από το χωριό;
translations.id: Apakah kamu melihat lembah di belakang desa?
translations.ja: 村の後ろにある谷が見える?

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking 'la vallée' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'vallée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'vois'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('derrière le village').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'village'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'derrière'.

translations.en: I love this valley in spring.
translations.es: Me encanta este valle en primavera.
translations.de: Ich liebe dieses Tal im Frühling.
translations.yue: 我好鍾意呢個山谷嘅春天。
translations.pt: Eu adoro este vale na primavera.
translations.he: אני אוהב את העמק הזה באביב.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích thung lũng này vào mùa xuân.
translations.ar: أنا أحب هذا الوادي في الربيع.
translations.nl: Ik hou van deze vallei in de lente.
translations.hi: मुझे वसंत में यह घाटी बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Λατρεύω αυτή την κοιλάδα την άνοιξη.
translations.nb: Jeg elsker denne dalen om våren.
translations.id: Saya sangat menyukai lembah ini pada musim semi.
translations.sv: Jag älskar den här dalen på våren.
translations.da: Jeg elsker denne dal om foråret.
translations.ja: 春のこの谷が大好きです.

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel; syntactic subject of 'adore'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'cette vallée' as direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; deictic marker for 'vallée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'adore'.
Fused form of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le'; introduces a temporal PP ('au printemps').
Common noun; complement of the fused preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Ils vivent dans une vallée très isolée.
sentences.reading: /il viv dɑ̃z yn vale tʁɛ izɔle/

translations.fr: Ils vivent dans une vallée très isolée.
translations.ipa: /il viv dɑ̃z yn vale tʁɛ izɔle/
translations.en: They live in a very isolated valley.
translations.es: Viven en un valle muy aislado.
translations.de: Sie leben in einem sehr abgelegenen Tal.
translations.it: Vivono in una valle molto isolata.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们住在一个非常偏僻的山谷里。
translations.yue: 佢哋住喺一個好偏僻嘅山谷入面。
translations.ru: Они живут в очень удалённой долине.
translations.pt: Eles moram em um vale muito isolado.
translations.vi: Họ sống trong một thung lũng rất xa xôi hẻo lánh.
translations.ar: هم يعيشون في وادٍ معزول جدًا.
translations.nl: Ze wonen in een zeer afgelegen vallei.
translations.uk: Вони живуть у дуже віддаленій долині.
translations.hi: वे एक बहुत अलग-थलग घाटी में रहते हैं.
translations.el: Ζουν σε μια πολύ απομονωμένη κοιλάδα.
translations.nb: De bor i en svært isolert dal.
translations.id: Mereka tinggal di sebuah lembah yang sangat terpencil.
translations.sv: De bor i en mycket avlägsen dal.
translations.ro: Ei locuiesc într-o vale foarte izolată.
translations.da: De bor i en meget isoleret dal.
translations.ja: 彼らはとても人里離れた谷に住んでいる.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes a locative complement introduced by 'dans'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'vallée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
Adverb of degree; intensifies the adjective 'isolée'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'vallée'.
